title: PSSSB – Veterinary Inspector – 150 Posts

basic_details.job_title: PSSSB Veterinary Inspector Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 150 Posts
basic_details.short_information: PSSSB Recruitment 2026–27: Get latest PSSSB recruitment notification 2026 for 150 Veterinary Inspector vacancies. Apply online from 4th May 2026 to 25th May 2026 through the official PSSSB career portal.
basic_details.organization_name: Directorate, Animal Husbandry Department, Government of Punjab

application_fee.general_fee: Category-wise online application fee as given under the “Fee Details” section of the notification

qualification.education_qualification: As per prescribed educational/technical qualification for Veterinary Inspector (as given in the notification)

salary_details.pay_scale: As per Punjab Government Group-C pay scale for Veterinary Inspector (refer notification)

how_to_apply: The application process for Punjab SSSB Veterinary Inspector Recruitment 2026 is completely online through the official website of SSSB Punjab. Applications submitted through any mode other than the online portal will not be accepted under any circumstances.
seo_tags: Punjab Subordinate Services Selection Board Veterinary Inspector Recruitment 2026
